Google Drive.title: Google Drive
Google Drive.description: Search, read, and fetch lease/contract documents from Google Drive so tabular review can run directly against a Drive folder.

Slack.title: Slack
Slack.description: Post tabular review / CoC review results and flags to a deal or diligence channel.

DocuSign.title: DocuSign
DocuSign.description: Pull executed lease/contract packages and status directly for review.

_roadmap_note: M365 connector is on the roadmap (see README) but has no public MCP endpoint verified yet -- do not wire up a placeholder URL until confirmed.
